data.title: Stock of Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) dropped by 10% after missing earnings and revenue expectations in the latest quarter, despite a 10.4% increase in sales.
data.description: Shares of Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE: DRI) plummeted by nearly 10% on Thursday following disappointing quarterly financial results. The parent company of Olive Garden reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.97 for the first quarter, falling short of the expected $2.00 as per analyst estimates. Quarterly revenue also fell below expectations at $3.004 billion, missing the projected $3.040 billion. Despite this, total sales saw a 10.4% increase, fueled by a 4.7% rise in same-restaurant sales and revenue from the acquisition of 103 new locations. This growth was overshadowed by the earnings miss, causing the significant drop in stock value.

data.title: Oscilar wins 2 industry awards for anti-fraud and AML innovation, consolidating its position in financial crime detection.
data.description: A company based in Palo Alto, California revealed on September 18, 2025, that Oscilar, an AI Risk Decisioning™ platform utilized for onboarding, fraud detection, credit evaluation, and compliance adherence, received acknowledgment through two notable industry accolades. This recognition highlights Oscilar's innovation in the realm of financial crime identification and regulatory compliance.

data.title: VeChain (VET) price rises by 6.62% to reach $0.03 amid bullish technical signals, indicating potential for further growth.
data.description: The value of VET has surged to $0.03, driven by positive signals in technical analysis. The crucial resistance level stands at $0.03, with momentum indicators indicating the likelihood of further price increases.

data.title: David Kilpatrick appointed Director of Learning at Folger Shakespeare Library to enhance educational offerings and public programming.
data.description: David Kilpatrick has been appointed as the new Director of the Folger Shakespeare Library in Washington. He will focus on expanding the library's educational programs and collaborating with senior leadership to create innovative public programming. This announcement was made on September 18, 2025.

data.title: Life Time launches 2nd 30 Strong Challenge with 50,000+ participants in 2024. Registration now open for Oct. 6.
data.description: Over 50,000 individuals engaged in the inaugural 30-day wellness program in 2024 in CHANHASSEN, Minnesota. On September 18, 2025, Life Time (NYSE: LTH), the leading healthy lifestyle brand in the United States, launched this initiative as the autumn season nears and individuals seek to adopt fresh, health-conscious habits.

data.title: Dr. Paola Ballester's AI platform EasyPA speeds up care approvals by 10x, aiming to fix the broken prior authorization process.
data.description: Dr. Paola Ballester, a forward-thinking doctor and CEO of an AI-based healthcare platform, recently appeared on the Disruption/Interruption podcast. During the discussion, she outlined how EasyPA's innovative platform is revolutionizing the flawed prior authorization system. Dr. Ballester detailed how the technology streamlines approvals, leading to a 10-fold increase in processing efficiency.

data.title: vflok Inc. launches AI scheduling copilot for nurses at Wellstar Health System's 11 hospitals, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: In Atlanta on September 18, 2025, vflok™ Inc., a Workforce AI startup, announced their efforts to enhance schedule flexibility and remove redundant tasks for nursing teams. They have expanded their agentic AI platform to all 11 hospitals within the Wellstar Health System following a prosperous trial period. This initiative aims to increase efficiency and streamline operations for the nursing staff, benefiting a significant number of medical professionals working in the hospitals.

data.title: NY Orthopedics adds 2 affiliates - Rehabilitation Medicine Center of New York & Newark Rehabilitation Center, expanding network.
data.description: In Scarsdale, New York, on September 18, 2025, it was announced that the Rehabilitation Medicine Center of New York (RMC) and Newark Rehabilitation Center (NRC), renowned for their expertise in interventional pain management, spine surgery, and orthopedics, have become affiliates of NY Orthopedics. This partnership brings together three prominent practices dedicated to providing comprehensive care in the field. This news marks a significant development in the medical sector, where the combined resources and experience of these centers will benefit a wide range of patients seeking specialized treatment.

data.title: New podcast tackles literacy crisis as a social justice issue to reshape learning for all children. Subscribe now.
data.description: Don't miss out on the opportunity to be a part of the national dialogue focused on transforming literacy and education for all children by subscribing to the Literacy & Justice for All Podcast. According to a recent press release dated September 17, 2025, issued from Atlanta, the issue of illiteracy goes beyond just an educational hurdle; it stands as a significant barrier to equality within our society. Join the conversation today to be a part of reshaping the future of literacy for every child.

data.title: Crypto majors rise post-FOMC; BTC hits $117,300. SOL up 5%, BNB tops $1,000. HYPE at ATH $59, announces Phase 2. TokenWorks & PNKSTR unveil perpetual machine rollouts for 5 new NFT collections, token soars. Green market after FOMC cut; BTC +1% at $117,300, ETH +2% at $4,580, XRP +3% at $3.11, SOL +5% at $247. Top movers: PENGU (+14%), SPX (+11%), AVAX (+10%). Bitcoin ETFs see $51M outflows; Moneygram partners with Crossmint on stablecoins. Kraken, Circle collaborate on USDC & EURC access. NYDFS urges blockchain analytics for AML. Trump statue with Bitcoin at US Capitol; SEC approves standard for crypto ETFs.
data.description: Cryptocurrency market saw a positive trend following the recent FOMC decision with BTC trading at $117,300, up 1%. SOL surged 5% after Forward Industries unveiled a $4B ATM project, while BNB surpassed $1,000 for the first time. CZ saw a notable increase in ASTER by 400%. HYPE hit an all-time high at $59, with Project X revealing Phase 2. TokenWorks & PNKSTR announced machine rollouts, boosting NFT collections. Top movers included PENGU (+14%), SPX (+11%), and AVAX (+10%). BTC ETFs experienced $51M net outflows after a 7-day inflow streak, with ETH ETFs also facing outflows. Moneygram partnered with Crossmint to introduce stablecoins to 50M customers across 200 countries. Kraken and Circle collaborated to enhance stablecoin access through USDC & EURC integration. NYDFS urged banks to adopt blockchain analytics for AML/sanctions compliance. A gold statue of Trump holding Bitcoin was installed at the U.S. Capitol, and SEC approved a generic listing standard to expedite crypto ETF approvals.

data.title: NBA star Kevin Durant forgot his Coinbase password, causing Bitcoin to soar 11,000%. Durant bought Bitcoin in 2016.
data.description: NBA player Kevin Durant encountered a fortunate turn of events when he forgot his Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) password, preventing access to his account where he had been buying Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) since 2016 while playing for the Golden State Warriors. As reported by CBNC, Durant has yet to recover his password as Bitcoin's value continues to rise. The interest in cryptocurrency sparked for Durant after engaging in a discussion with teammates during a dinner, prompting him and his business partner Rich Kleiman to start investing in Bitcoin the following day when prices were around $360. For more details on Durant's Bitcoin journey, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Corvias welcomes thousands of students in 43 buildings with 16,000 beds across 14 institutions, ensuring a positive living experience.
data.description: Corvias, a comprehensive housing provider based in Warwick, Rhode Island, manages student housing operations across 14 institutions, encompassing 43 buildings and accommodating 16,000 beds. Annually, the company dedicates efforts to facilitate the seamless move-in of thousands of students to ensure a favorable living experience. Recognizing the significant influence of on-campus housing on student success, Corvias collaborates closely with the residence life teams and other campus officials to establish nurturing communities that resonate with students as their cherished abode.

data.title: Middlefield Canadian Income PCC declares dividend; includes Middlefield Canadian Income – GBP PC. Company Registration No: 93546, LEI: 2138007ENW3JEJXC8658.
data.description: Middlefield Canadian Income PCC, a company registered with the number 93546 and a legal entity identifier of 2138007ENW3JEJXC8658, comprises the Middlefield Canadian Income – GBP PC, which operates as a cell of the company.

data.title: The5ers expands funding programs to U.S. traders, funded thousands globally since 2016, broadening access to prop trading.
data.description: Since its establishment in 2016, The5ers has provided funding to thousands of traders across the globe. The company offers capital and performance-based scaling, aligning with its goal to expand access to prop trading worldwide through cTrader. Recently, on September 18, 2025, The5ers revealed its initiative to open up funding opportunities...
